---
title: "Week 6: Robustness and Heterogeneity Analysis"
author: "Nicholas Mwanza"
date: "April 2026"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, fig.width = 10, fig.height = 8)
```

```{r}
rm(list = ls())
setwd("/home/student25/Documents/Projects/Essay/Scripts/")

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(data.table)
library(DoubleML)
library(mlr3)
library(mlr3learners)
library(ranger)
library(xgboost)
library(haven)

output_dir <- "/home/student25/Documents/Projects/Essay/Figures/"
data_dir <- "/home/student25/Documents/Projects/Essay/Cleaned/"
if(!dir.exists(output_dir)) dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
```

```{r}
analytical_2015 <- readRDS("/home/student25/Documents/Projects/Essay/Cleaned/analytical_2015.rds")
analytical_2020 <- readRDS("/home/student25/Documents/Projects/Essay/Cleaned/analytical_2020.rds")
analytical_combined <- readRDS("/home/student25/Documents/Projects/Essay/Cleaned/analytical_combined.rds")

week5_results <- readRDS(paste0(data_dir, "week5_doubleml_improved_results.rds"))

cat("KMIS 2015:", nrow(analytical_2015), "children\n")
cat("KMIS 2020:", nrow(analytical_2020), "children\n")
cat("Combined:", nrow(analytical_combined), "children\n")

cat("\nVariable names in analytical_2015:\n")
print(names(analytical_2015))
```

```{r}
prepare_dml_data_cluster <- function(data, survey_name) {
  
  dml_data <- data %>%
    mutate(
      malaria_num = as.numeric(malaria),
      itn_use_num = as.numeric(itn_use),
      sex_num = ifelse(sex == "Male", 0, 1),
      residence_num = ifelse(residence == "Urban", 0, 1),
      wealth_num = as.numeric(wealth)
    ) %>%
    select(
      malaria_num, itn_use_num, cluster,
      age_months, sex_num, wealth_num, residence_num,
      rainfall, temp_mean, evi, aridity, wet_days, population
    ) %>%
    filter(complete.cases(.))
  
  cat(survey_name, ": ", nrow(data), " -> ", nrow(dml_data), " complete cases\n")
  return(dml_data)
}

dml_data_2015 <- prepare_dml_data_cluster(analytical_2015, "KMIS 2015")
dml_data_2020 <- prepare_dml_data_cluster(analytical_2020, "KMIS 2020")
dml_data_combined <- prepare_dml_data_cluster(analytical_combined, "Combined")

dml_data_combined_rf <- dml_data_combined %>%
  mutate(cluster_fe = as.factor(cluster)) %>%
  select(-cluster)

dml_data_2015_rf <- dml_data_2015 %>%
  mutate(cluster_fe = as.factor(cluster)) %>%
  select(-cluster)

dml_data_2020_rf <- dml_data_2020 %>%
  mutate(cluster_fe = as.factor(cluster)) %>%
  select(-cluster)

dml_data_combined_xgb <- dml_data_combined %>%
  select(-cluster)

prepare_heterogeneity_data <- function(data) {
  het_data <- data %>%
    mutate(
      malaria_num = as.numeric(malaria),
      itn_use_num = as.numeric(itn_use),
      sex_num = ifelse(sex == "Male", 0, 1),
      wealth_num = as.numeric(wealth),
      wealth_factor = wealth,  # wealth is already a factor
      residence_num = ifelse(residence == "Urban", 0, 1),
      residence_factor = residence  # residence is already a factor
    ) %>%
    select(
      malaria_num, itn_use_num,
      age_months, sex_num, wealth_num, wealth_factor, 
      residence_num, residence_factor,
      rainfall, temp_mean, evi, aridity, wet_days, population
    ) %>%
    filter(complete.cases(.))
  return(het_data)
}

het_data_combined <- prepare_heterogeneity_data(analytical_combined)

dml_dt_2015_rf <- as.data.table(dml_data_2015_rf)
dml_dt_2020_rf <- as.data.table(dml_data_2020_rf)
dml_dt_combined_rf <- as.data.table(dml_data_combined_rf)
dml_dt_combined_xgb <- as.data.table(dml_data_combined_xgb)

covariates_rf <- c("age_months", "sex_num", "wealth_num", "residence_num",
                   "rainfall", "temp_mean", "evi", "aridity", "wet_days", "population",
                   "cluster_fe")

covariates_xgb <- c("age_months", "sex_num", "wealth_num", "residence_num",
                    "rainfall", "temp_mean", "evi", "aridity", "wet_days", "population")

cat("RF covariates (with cluster):", length(covariates_rf), "\n")
cat("XGB covariates:", length(covariates_xgb), "\n")

obj_dml_2015_rf <- double_ml_data_from_data_frame(
  df = dml_dt_2015_rf, y_col = "malaria_num", d_cols = "itn_use_num", x_cols = covariates_rf)

obj_dml_2020_rf <- double_ml_data_from_data_frame(
  df = dml_dt_2020_rf, y_col = "malaria_num", d_cols = "itn_use_num", x_cols = covariates_rf)

obj_dml_combined_rf <- double_ml_data_from_data_frame(
  df = dml_dt_combined_rf, y_col = "malaria_num", d_cols = "itn_use_num", x_cols = covariates_rf)

obj_dml_combined_xgb <- double_ml_data_from_data_frame(
  df = dml_dt_combined_xgb, y_col = "malaria_num", d_cols = "itn_use_num", x_cols = covariates_xgb)

cat("Combined RF:", obj_dml_combined_rf$n_obs, "obs\n")
cat("Combined XGB:", obj_dml_combined_xgb$n_obs, "obs\n")
```

```{r}
learner_rf_base_g <- lrn("regr.ranger", num.trees = 500, min.node.size = 10)
learner_rf_base_m <- lrn("classif.ranger", num.trees = 500, min.node.size = 10, predict_type = "prob")

learner_rf_tuned_g <- lrn("regr.ranger", num.trees = 1000, min.node.size = 10)
learner_rf_tuned_m <- lrn("classif.ranger", num.trees = 1000, min.node.size = 10, predict_type = "prob")

learner_rf_small_g <- lrn("regr.ranger", num.trees = 500, min.node.size = 5)
learner_rf_small_m <- lrn("classif.ranger", num.trees = 500, min.node.size = 5, predict_type = "prob")

learner_gb_g <- lrn("regr.xgboost", nrounds = 100, max_depth = 3, eta = 0.1)
learner_gb_m <- lrn("classif.xgboost", nrounds = 100, max_depth = 3, eta = 0.1, predict_type = "prob")

learner_gb200_g <- lrn("regr.xgboost", nrounds = 200, max_depth = 3, eta = 0.1)
learner_gb200_m <- lrn("classif.xgboost", nrounds = 200, max_depth = 3, eta = 0.1, predict_type = "prob")
```

```{r}
run_robustness_dml <- function(data_obj, ml_g, ml_m, n_folds, survey_name, learner_name) {
  dml_irm <- DoubleMLIRM$new(
    data = data_obj, ml_g = ml_g, ml_m = ml_m,
    n_folds = n_folds, score = "ATE")
  dml_irm$fit()
  
  data.frame(
    Survey = survey_name,
    Learner = learner_name,
    N_Folds = n_folds,
    ATE = dml_irm$coef,
    SE = dml_irm$se,
    CI_Lower = dml_irm$coef - 1.96 * dml_irm$se,
    CI_Upper = dml_irm$coef + 1.96 * dml_irm$se,
    OR = exp(dml_irm$coef),
    OR_CI_Lower = exp(dml_irm$coef - 1.96 * dml_irm$se),
    OR_CI_Upper = exp(dml_irm$coef + 1.96 * dml_irm$se),
    P_Value = dml_irm$pval
  )
}
```

```{r}
robustness_results <- bind_rows(
  run_robustness_dml(obj_dml_combined_rf, learner_rf_base_g, learner_rf_base_m, 5, "Combined", "Baseline RF (w/ cluster)"),
  run_robustness_dml(obj_dml_combined_rf, learner_rf_tuned_g, learner_rf_tuned_m, 5, "Combined", "Tuned RF (w/ cluster)"),
  run_robustness_dml(obj_dml_combined_rf, learner_rf_small_g, learner_rf_small_m, 5, "Combined", "RF (small node)"),
  run_robustness_dml(obj_dml_combined_xgb, learner_gb_g, learner_gb_m, 5, "Combined", "XGBoost (100 rounds)"),
  run_robustness_dml(obj_dml_combined_xgb, learner_gb200_g, learner_gb200_m, 5, "Combined", "XGBoost (200 rounds)")
)

cat("\nRobustness results (OR scale):\n")
robustness_results %>%
  mutate(OR = round(OR, 3), CI = paste0("(", round(OR_CI_Lower, 3), "-", round(OR_CI_Upper, 3), ")")) %>%
  select(Learner, OR, CI, P_Value) %>% print()
```

```{r}
run_heterogeneity_wealth <- function(het_data, survey_name) {
  results <- data.frame()
  wealth_levels <- c("Poorest", "Poorer", "Middle", "Richer", "Richest")
  
  for(w in wealth_levels) {
    data_subset <- het_data %>% filter(wealth_factor == w)
    
    if(nrow(data_subset) > 200) {
      dml_subset <- data_subset %>%
        select(-wealth_factor, -residence_factor) %>%
        mutate(cluster = 1:n())
      
      dml_dt_subset <- as.data.table(dml_subset)
      covars_subset <- covariates_xgb[covariates_xgb != "wealth_num"]
      
      obj_dml_sub <- double_ml_data_from_data_frame(
        df = dml_dt_subset, y_col = "malaria_num", d_cols = "itn_use_num",
        x_cols = covars_subset)
      
      dml_irm <- DoubleMLIRM$new(
        data = obj_dml_sub,
        ml_g = lrn("regr.xgboost", nrounds = 100, max_depth = 3, eta = 0.1),
        ml_m = lrn("classif.xgboost", nrounds = 100, max_depth = 3, eta = 0.1, predict_type = "prob"),
        n_folds = 5, score = "ATE")
      dml_irm$fit()
      
      results <- bind_rows(results, data.frame(
        Survey = survey_name,
        Subgroup = w,
        N = nrow(data_subset),
        OR = exp(dml_irm$coef),
        CI_Lower = exp(dml_irm$coef - 1.96 * dml_irm$se),
        CI_Upper = exp(dml_irm$coef + 1.96 * dml_irm$se),
        P_Value = dml_irm$pval
      ))
    }
  }
  return(results)
}

heterogeneity_wealth <- run_heterogeneity_wealth(het_data_combined, "Combined")

cat("\nHeterogeneity by wealth:\n")
heterogeneity_wealth %>%
  mutate(OR = round(OR, 3), CI = paste0("(", round(CI_Lower, 3), "-", round(CI_Upper, 3), ")")) %>%
  select(Subgroup, N, OR, CI, P_Value) %>% print()
```

```{r}
run_heterogeneity_residence <- function(het_data, survey_name) {
  results <- data.frame()
  
  for(res in c("Urban", "Rural")) {
    data_subset <- het_data %>% filter(residence_factor == res)
    
    if(nrow(data_subset) > 200) {
      dml_subset <- data_subset %>%
        select(-wealth_factor, -residence_factor) %>%
        mutate(cluster = 1:n())
      
      dml_dt_subset <- as.data.table(dml_subset)
      covars_subset <- covariates_xgb[covariates_xgb != "residence_num"]
      
      obj_dml_sub <- double_ml_data_from_data_frame(
        df = dml_dt_subset, y_col = "malaria_num", d_cols = "itn_use_num",
        x_cols = covars_subset)
      
      dml_irm <- DoubleMLIRM$new(
        data = obj_dml_sub,
        ml_g = lrn("regr.xgboost", nrounds = 100, max_depth = 3, eta = 0.1),
        ml_m = lrn("classif.xgboost", nrounds = 100, max_depth = 3, eta = 0.1, predict_type = "prob"),
        n_folds = 5, score = "ATE")
      dml_irm$fit()
      
      results <- bind_rows(results, data.frame(
        Survey = survey_name,
        Subgroup = res,
        N = nrow(data_subset),
        OR = exp(dml_irm$coef),
        CI_Lower = exp(dml_irm$coef - 1.96 * dml_irm$se),
        CI_Upper = exp(dml_irm$coef + 1.96 * dml_irm$se),
        P_Value = dml_irm$pval
      ))
    }
  }
  return(results)
}

heterogeneity_residence <- run_heterogeneity_residence(het_data_combined, "Combined")

cat("\nHeterogeneity by residence:\n")
heterogeneity_residence %>%
  mutate(OR = round(OR, 3), CI = paste0("(", round(CI_Lower, 3), "-", round(CI_Upper, 3), ")")) %>%
  select(Subgroup, N, OR, CI, P_Value) %>% print()
```

```{r}
run_heterogeneity_age <- function(het_data, survey_name) {
  results <- data.frame()
  
  age_groups <- list(
    c(0, 12, "0-11 months"),
    c(12, 24, "12-23 months"),
    c(24, 36, "24-35 months"),
    c(36, 60, "36-59 months")
  )
  
  for(ag in age_groups) {
    data_subset <- het_data %>% filter(age_months >= ag[1] & age_months < ag[2])
    
    if(nrow(data_subset) > 200) {
      dml_subset <- data_subset %>%
        select(-wealth_factor, -residence_factor) %>%
        mutate(cluster = 1:n())
      
      dml_dt_subset <- as.data.table(dml_subset)
      
      obj_dml_sub <- double_ml_data_from_data_frame(
        df = dml_dt_subset, y_col = "malaria_num", d_cols = "itn_use_num",
        x_cols = covariates_xgb)
      
      dml_irm <- DoubleMLIRM$new(
        data = obj_dml_sub,
        ml_g = lrn("regr.xgboost", nrounds = 100, max_depth = 3, eta = 0.1),
        ml_m = lrn("classif.xgboost", nrounds = 100, max_depth = 3, eta = 0.1, predict_type = "prob"),
        n_folds = 5, score = "ATE")
      dml_irm$fit()
      
      results <- bind_rows(results, data.frame(
        Survey = survey_name,
        Subgroup = ag[3],
        N = nrow(data_subset),
        OR = exp(dml_irm$coef),
        CI_Lower = exp(dml_irm$coef - 1.96 * dml_irm$se),
        CI_Upper = exp(dml_irm$coef + 1.96 * dml_irm$se),
        P_Value = dml_irm$pval
      ))
    }
  }
  return(results)
}

heterogeneity_age <- run_heterogeneity_age(het_data_combined, "Combined")

cat("\nHeterogeneity by age:\n")
heterogeneity_age %>%
  mutate(OR = round(OR, 3), CI = paste0("(", round(CI_Lower, 3), "-", round(CI_Upper, 3), ")")) %>%
  select(Subgroup, N, OR, CI, P_Value) %>% print()
```

```{r}
rainfall_quantiles <- quantile(het_data_combined$rainfall, probs = c(0.33, 0.67), na.rm = TRUE)

het_data_combined_rain <- het_data_combined %>%
  mutate(
    rainfall_group = case_when(
      rainfall <= rainfall_quantiles[1] ~ "Low rainfall",
      rainfall <= rainfall_quantiles[2] ~ "Medium rainfall",
      TRUE ~ "High rainfall"
    )
  )

run_heterogeneity_rainfall <- function(het_data, survey_name) {
  results <- data.frame()
  
  for(rain_group in c("Low rainfall", "Medium rainfall", "High rainfall")) {
    data_subset <- het_data %>% filter(rainfall_group == rain_group)
    
    if(nrow(data_subset) > 200) {
      dml_subset <- data_subset %>%
        select(-wealth_factor, -residence_factor, -rainfall_group) %>%
        mutate(cluster = 1:n())
      
      dml_dt_subset <- as.data.table(dml_subset)
      covars_subset <- covariates_xgb[covariates_xgb != "rainfall"]
      
      obj_dml_sub <- double_ml_data_from_data_frame(
        df = dml_dt_subset, y_col = "malaria_num", d_cols = "itn_use_num",
        x_cols = covars_subset)
      
      dml_irm <- DoubleMLIRM$new(
        data = obj_dml_sub,
        ml_g = lrn("regr.xgboost", nrounds = 100, max_depth = 3, eta = 0.1),
        ml_m = lrn("classif.xgboost", nrounds = 100, max_depth = 3, eta = 0.1, predict_type = "prob"),
        n_folds = 5, score = "ATE")
      dml_irm$fit()
      
      results <- bind_rows(results, data.frame(
        Survey = survey_name,
        Subgroup = rain_group,
        N = nrow(data_subset),
        OR = exp(dml_irm$coef),
        CI_Lower = exp(dml_irm$coef - 1.96 * dml_irm$se),
        CI_Upper = exp(dml_irm$coef + 1.96 * dml_irm$se),
        P_Value = dml_irm$pval
      ))
    }
  }
  return(results)
}

heterogeneity_rainfall <- run_heterogeneity_rainfall(het_data_combined_rain, "Combined")

cat("\nHeterogeneity by rainfall:\n")
heterogeneity_rainfall %>%
  mutate(OR = round(OR, 3), CI = paste0("(", round(CI_Lower, 3), "-", round(CI_Upper, 3), ")")) %>%
  select(Subgroup, N, OR, CI, P_Value) %>% print()
```

```{r}
all_heterogeneity <- bind_rows(
  heterogeneity_wealth %>% mutate(Type = "Wealth Quintile"),
  heterogeneity_residence %>% mutate(Type = "Residence"),
  heterogeneity_age %>% mutate(Type = "Age Group"),
  heterogeneity_rainfall %>% mutate(Type = "Rainfall Level")
)

all_heterogeneity$Subgroup <- factor(all_heterogeneity$Subgroup,
  levels = c("Poorest", "Poorer", "Middle", "Richer", "Richest",
             "Urban", "Rural",
             "0-11 months", "12-23 months", "24-35 months", "36-59 months",
             "Low rainfall", "Medium rainfall", "High rainfall"))

p_heterogeneity <- ggplot(all_heterogeneity, aes(x = OR, y = Subgroup, color = Type)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = CI_Lower, xmax = CI_Upper),
                 height = 0.2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.5), linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_x_log10(breaks = c(0.5, 0.75, 0.9, 1, 1.1, 1.25),
                labels = c("0.50", "0.75", "0.90", "1.00", "1.10", "1.25")) +
  labs(title = "Heterogeneous Treatment Effects of ITN Use on Malaria",
       x = "Odds Ratio (log scale)", y = "") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set2")

print(p_heterogeneity)
ggsave(paste0(output_dir, "week6_heterogeneity_forest.png"),
       p_heterogeneity, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
robustness_plot_data <- robustness_results %>%
  mutate(Learner = factor(Learner, levels = c(
    "Baseline RF (w/ cluster)",
    "Tuned RF (w/ cluster)",
    "RF (small node)",
    "XGBoost (100 rounds)",
    "XGBoost (200 rounds)"
  )))

p_robustness <- ggplot(robustness_plot_data, aes(x = OR, y = Learner)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 3, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = OR_CI_Lower, xmax = OR_CI_Upper),
                 height = 0.2, color = "steelblue", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_x_log10(breaks = c(0.92, 0.94, 0.96, 0.98, 1.00),
                labels = c("0.92", "0.94", "0.96", "0.98", "1.00")) +
  labs(title = "Robustness of DML Estimates to Different Learners",
       x = "Odds Ratio (log scale)", y = "") +
  theme_minimal()

print(p_robustness)
ggsave(paste0(output_dir, "week6_robustness_comparison.png"),
       p_robustness, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
saveRDS(robustness_results, paste0(data_dir, "week6_robustness_results_improved.rds"))
saveRDS(all_heterogeneity, paste0(data_dir, "week6_heterogeneity_results_improved.rds"))

cat("\nWeek 6 complete.\n")
```
